name: Primoco UAV SE
summary: Primoco UAV SE develops, produces, and sells unmanned aerial vehicles (UAV) and aircraft engines in Russia, the Middle East, Africa, Asia, and South America. It also offers air and training services. The company's products are used in agriculture; remote mapping; power line corridor mapping; military UAV training; civil engineering; law enforcement; surveillance and reconnaissance; airspace navaid systems calibration; electronic warfare; disaster relief; pipeline and energy lines monitoring; railway monitoring; target drone; and environmental protection and research, as well as in coastal surveillance, search and rescue, and border protection activities. Primoco UAV SE was founded in 2015 and is based in Prague, the Czech Republic.
